summary: Comprehensive testing of Central Inventory app. All 10 features verified - Login, Operations Hub, Sidebar Navigation, Backend APIs (root, pending-queues, hierarchy-summary), and all frontend pages load correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load, navigation works, login works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified. Backend APIs working via proxy to preprod.mygenie.online. Frontend pages: Login, Operations Hub, Hierarchy Summary, Pending Queues, History & Ledger all load correctly. Write operations are blocked (Phase 1 read-only mode).

features_tested.1_login_page_renders: PASS - Email and password fields present, Sign In button works
features_tested.2_login_with_seed_account: PASS - abhishek@kalabahia.com / Qplazm@10 logs in successfully
features_tested.3_operations_hub_loads: PASS - Shows Pending Approvals (3), Ready to Dispatch (1), Pending Receives (0)
features_tested.4_sidebar_navigation: PASS - Operations Hub, Hierarchy Summary, Pending Queues, History & Ledger all navigate correctly
features_tested.5_backend_api_root: PASS - /api/ returns 'Central Inventory API Proxy' message
features_tested.7_backend_hierarchy_summary: PASS - /api/proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/hierarchy-summary returns stores list with DemoCentral1, DemoCentral2
features_tested.8_hierarchy_summary_page: PASS - Shows Master Stores tab with DemoCentral1 (57 sent, 175 received, 6 transactions) and DemoCentral2
features_tested.9_pending_queues_page: PASS - Shows Approvals (3), Ready to Dispatch (1), Receives, My Requests tabs
features_tested.10_history_ledger_page: PASS - Shows Transfer History (5 transfers) and Stock Ledger tabs with filters
